transcript: Yes, hi, yeah, this is Burt Mountain. I’m calling from the City Comptroller’s office. How are you today?
Okay, yeah. Say, we just got sort of a situation over here and thought I’d give you a call. Uh… sort of—

Yeah, we’ve got sort of a… irate gentleman here who’s… uh, just causing a sort of a ruckus and sort of a disturbance here. Apparently, uh, you won’t return his calls and he’s— he’s under the impression that you work here or something like that. I explained that you don’t work in our office [sighs], um, here in Shasta. But, um, his name is Joe. That’s about all I’ve been able to get out of him. [chuckles] So, uh, does this ring a bell to ye, or…? Anything like that, or…?
No, there’s nobody I would not return calls for.
His name’s Joe and he’s causing kind of a scene up here and he says he needs to talk to ye.
Do you wanna put him on the phone? Is he in your office?—
Okay, yeah, hold on one sec.
My name is Anne Thomas. You’re calling me?
Why are you calling me? Who are you?
And why—? Why are you calling me back?
Uh… they told me you wanted to talk to me. Can you put the other gentleman on the phone? Thank you!
What gentleman? What are you talkin’ about? I don’t know— Who are you? I won’t know why— who you are.
You’re a motherfuckin’ whore! You’re a fuckin’ prostitute! Criminal Piece o’ shit! Drop Dead! Fuck you! You piece o’ shit! You’re a cancer to America! You piece o’ shit!
Um… can you please explain to me why there’s someone on the phone yelling like—? I don’t understand what the hell’s happening.
Yeah, this— this fella here at our office, like I say, is a little upset, uh, with you— wouldn’t return his calls and he’s causing sort of a scene over here.
But the— He’s clearly not called me. That guy is crazy. Right?—
Uh, yeah, I beg your pardon. Yeah, he— he, uh, broke a toilet here and he broke a window over here. So got kind of a situation over here.—
I don’t know who he is— He doesn’t know who I am. I don’t know who he is.—
Oh, yeah, he’s jumpin’ all around sayin’ that Anne wouldn’t return his call and everythin’ like that, so it’s kind of a scene over here.
Well please tell everyone he doesn’t recognize— I just told him I was Anne Thomas. He doesn’t know who I am. And—
Well he’s— Yeah, he was demanding to talk to you and, uh, things like that. I… I’m not sure—
I just talked to him. He doesn’t know who I am.
Oh, w—? What did he say?—

This guy— I— I don’t know who he is, he does— I— He asked me five times who I was and I said I’m Anne Thomas and he doesn’t— and then he swore at me and says he doesn’t know who I am. So… I don’t know where he got my name.—

Why are you calling me? Who are you? Who are you—? Why are you calling me, I asked you! You’re a criminal, you’re a piece of shit, you’re a whore, you’re a prostitute! Fuck you, chickenshit! You’re a chickenshit prostitute!
